title: Method and system for food and beverage tracking and consumption recommendations
abstract: A method, system, and device for providing a recommendation to a user about consumption of an item such as coffee. The method comprises the steps of: receiving (520) information about the user's consumption of the item; receiving (530) physiological sensor data about the user from one or more sensors (14); generating (540), based at least in part on the received information about the user's consumption of the item and the received physiological sensor data about the user, a model describing at least one characteristic of the user's physiological response to consumption of the item; generating (560), based at least in part on the generated model, a recommendation to the user about a future consumption of the item; and providing (570) the generated recommendation to the user.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: What is claimed is: 1. A computer-implemented method (500) for providing a recommendation to a user about consumption of an item, the method comprising the steps of: receiving (520) information about the user's consumption of the item; receiving (530) physiological sensor data about the user from one or more sensors (14); generating (540), based at least in part on the received information about the user's consumption of the item and the received physiological sensor data about the user, a model describing at least one characteristic of the user's physiological response to consumption of the item; generating (560), based at least in part on the generated model, a recommendation to the user about a future consumption of the item; and providing (570) the generated recommendation to the user. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein the information about the user's consumption of the item comprises the amount of the item consumed and the time of consumption. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the physiological sensor data about the user comprises one or more of blood pressure, heart rate, heart rhythm, heart rate variability, pulse, blood oxygen, body temperature, activity, posture, respiratory rate, muscle tension, brain activity, sleep stage, sleep onset latency, sleep duration, and activity level. 4. The method of claim 1, further comprising the step of receiving (550) a goal from the user, wherein the step of generating a recommendation is also based at least in part on the received goal. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the physiological sensor data is received from a sensor (14) of a wearable device (120). 6. The method of claim 1, wherein the physiological sensor data about the user is received from a sensor (14) of a coffee machine (150). 7. The method of claim 1, wherein the information about the user's consumption of the item is received from a coffee machine (150). 8. The method of claim 1, wherein the information about the user's consumption of the item is received from an intelligent coffee cup (150). 9. The method of claim 1 , wherein the recommendation comprises a time when the item should be consumed. 10. The method of claim 1 , wherein the recommendation comprises a time when the item should not be consumed. 11. The method of claim 1 , wherein the step of generating a recommendation is also based at least in part on a physical or behavioral status of the user. 12. The method of claim 1, wherein the item is a consumable that affects the cardiovascular system. 13. A system (100, 200) for providing a recommendation to a user about consumption of an item, the system comprising: a wearable device (120) comprising a sensor (14), a processor (12), and a display (20), wherein the sensor is configured to provide physiological sensor data about the user; a consumption monitoring device (150) configured to generate information about the user's consumption of the item, wherein the generated information is communicated to the processor; wherein the processor is configured to: (i) generate, based at least in part on the received information about the user's consumption of the item and the received physiological sensor data about the user, a model describing at least one characteristic of the user's physiological response to consumption of the item; (ii) generate, based at least in part on the 

 generated model, a recommendation to the user about a future consumption of the item; and cause the display to provide the generated recommendation to the user. 14. The system of claim 13, wherein the consumption monitoring device is configured to recognize the consumer. 15. A device (120, 150) for providing a recommendation to a user about consumption of an item, the device comprising: a sensor (14), wherein the sensor is configured to collect physiological sensor data about the user, and wherein the sensor is further configured to collect information about the user's consumption of the item; a processor (12), wherein the processor is configured to: (i) generate, based at least in part on the collected information about the user's consumption of the item and the collected physiological sensor data about the user, a model describing at least one characteristic of the user's physiological response to consumption of the item; (ii) generate, based at least in part on the generated model, a recommendation to the user about a future consumption of the item; and a display (20), wherein the display is configured to provide the generated recommendation to the user.
